# Gem City Cleaning Crew

> Professional residential and commercial cleaning services in Dayton, OH. No contracts, free quotes, serving the greater Dayton area since 2017.

## Services

- [House Cleaning](https://gemcitycleaningcrew.com/residential)
- [Recurring Cleaning](https://gemcitycleaningcrew.com/recurring-cleaning-service)
- [Deep Cleaning](https://gemcitycleaningcrew.com/deep-cleaning)
- [Move In / Move Out Cleaning](https://gemcitycleaningcrew.com/move-in-out-cleaning)
- [Airbnb Cleaning](https://gemcitycleaningcrew.com/airbnb-cleaning-service)
- [Office & Commercial Cleaning](https://gemcitycleaningcrew.com/commercial)
- [Retail Cleaning](https://gemcitycleaningcrew.com/retail-cleaning)
- [Industrial Cleaning](https://gemcitycleaningcrew.com/industrial-cleaning)

## Service Areas

Serving Dayton and the surrounding Miami Valley (30+ miles), including: Dayton, Kettering, Oakwood, Centerville, Miamisburg, Springboro, Huber Heights, Riverside, Xenia, Beavercreek, Fairborn, Yellow Springs, Tipp City, Bellbrook, Vandalia, Troy, Springfield, Franklin, Middletown, Carlisle.
See all locations: https://gemcitycleaningcrew.com/locations

## Blog

- [Move-In Cleaning for Dayton Student Rentals: 2026 Guide](https://gemcitycleaningcrew.com/blog/student-move-in-cleaning-dayton-ud-wright-state): UD move-in is August 21 and Wright State starts the 24th. Here's how to get a just-vacated Dayton student rental actually clean before the boxes arrive.
- [Ragweed Season in Dayton: How to Allergy-Proof Your Home](https://gemcitycleaningcrew.com/blog/ragweed-season-dayton-allergy-cleaning): Ragweed season runs mid-August through November in the Miami Valley. Here’s the room-by-room checklist that cuts down what you’re breathing indoors.
